name: list_disks
description: Lists Compute Engine disks. Details for each disk include name, ID, description, creation timestamp, size, type, status, last attach timestamp, and last detach timestamp. Requires project and zone as input.

parameters.description: Request message for listing disk basic info.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of results per page that should be returned.

pageToken.description: Optional. The page token received from the previous call.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.

zone.description: Required. The zone of the disks to list.
